med_violations.snippet: // Check if parent is an assignment (e.g., var p = Process.Start(...))
med_violations.detail: `p = Process.Start(...)` in src/Analyzers/OrphanProcessHandleAnalyzer.cs is followed by `await`/`throw`/method-end with no covering try/catch that calls Kill()/Dispose() on failure. If the await throws, the spawned handle is orphaned. Wrap the spawn in `try { ... } catch { proc?.Kill(); proc?.Dispose(); throw; }` or use `using var p = Process.Start(...);` if local.
